title: Transfer of Accreditation of Principal/Employer and Enrollment of
content: 22 Ships to Another LMA. The accreditation of a principal/employer and enrollment of ship 23 may be transferred to another LMA; provided, that such transfer shall be a continuation 24 of the seafarer’s contract and shall not involve diminution of wages and benefits of the 25 seafarer hired through the previous agency; and provided, further, that the transferee 26 agency shall execute an Affidavit of Assumption of Responsibility, as prescribed by the 27 Department, over all obligations of the principal/employer due to the seafarers originally 28 recruited, processed, or deployed by the former LMA, as well as other obligations arising 29 from the transfer of the ship and transfer of accreditation of principal/employer. 30 31 A succeeding LMA which seeks the accreditation of the same principal/employer from the 32 date of cancellation of the accreditation of the principal/employer with the previous LMA 33 shall be deemed a transferee agency. 34 35 For this purpose, any accreditation within six (6) months immediately following its 36 cancellation by the principal/employer shall be deemed a transfer of accreditation, in 37 which case, an assumption of responsibility of the principal/employer shall be required. 38 39
